parameters.jsCode:
const required = [
  'TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN',
  'TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET',
  'OWNER_USER_ID',
  'LLM_API_KEY',
  'LLM_API_BASE',
  'LLM_MODEL',
  'GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID',
  'GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET',
  'GOOGLE_REFRESH_TOKEN'
];

const optional = [
  'AUTH_MODE',
  'RATE_LIMIT_PER_MINUTE',
  'TELEGRAM_MAX_MESSAGE_LENGTH',
  'LLM_PROVIDER',
  'OLLAMA_API_BASE',
  'OLLAMA_MODEL',
  'OPENAI_API_KEY',
  'OPENAI_API_BASE',
  'OPENAI_MODEL',
  'ANTHROPIC_API_KEY',
  'ANTHROPIC_MODEL',
  'MEMORY_PROVIDER',
  'WOLFRAM_ALPHA_APPID',
  'SERPAPI_API_KEY',
  'GROQ_API_KEY',
  'SQLITE_MEMORY_URL',
  'SQLITE_MEMORY_PATH',
  'MAIL_AGENT_NAME',
  'CALENDAR_AGENT_NAME',
  'STORAGE_AGENT_NAME',
  'CONTACTS_AGENT_NAME',
  'DOCS_AGENT_NAME',
  'SLIDES_AGENT_NAME',
  'TASKS_AGENT_NAME',
  'SHEETS_AGENT_NAME',
  'KNOWLEDGE_AGENT_NAME',
  'CHAT_AGENT_NAME'
];

const missing = required.filter(key => !$env[key]);

const memoryProvider = ($env.MEMORY_PROVIDER || 'n8n-static').toLowerCase();
if (memoryProvider !== 'n8n-static') {
  if (memoryProvider === 'sqlite' && !$env.SQLITE_MEMORY_URL && !$env.SQLITE_MEMORY_PATH) {
    missing.push('SQLITE_MEMORY_URL or SQLITE_MEMORY_PATH');
  }
}

const present = required.filter(key => $env[key]);

return [{ json: { valid: missing.length === 0, missing, present, optional: optional.filter(key => $env[key]) } }];

const missing = $json.missing || [];
throw new Error('JARVIS config error: Missing required env var(s): ' + missing.join(', ') + '. Check n8n Settings → Environment Variables.');
return [{ json: { ...$json, config: { valid: true, env: Object.keys($env).reduce((acc, k) => { acc[k] = $env[k]; return acc; }, {}) } } }];
